title: Dato' Muhamad Iqbal bin Mohamad (Iqbal) — Criminal Prosecution (2026)
text:
Nature of offence: Abetment of the carrying on of a business in a regulated activity without holding a Capital Markets Services Licence (CMSL) or being a registered person.

Offender(s): Dato' Muhamad Iqbal bin Mohamad (Iqbal)

Facts: Iqbal was charged with one (1) charge under section 58(1) of the Capital Markets and Services Act 2007 (" CMSA ") read together with section 370(c) and section 367(1) CMSA pertaining to QEW Group Berhad's (" QGB ") act of abetting AUF MBZ in carrying on a business in the regulated activity of dealing in securities without holding a CMSL or being a registered person for dealing in securities. 
 Pursuant to section 367(1) CMSA, Iqbal in his capacity as QGB's director at the material time, is deemed to have committed the offence under section 58(1) CMSA, which occurred between 3 September 2021 to 15 February 2024 in Selangor.

Outcome: Iqbal was charged in the Kuala Lumpur Sessions Court on 23 February 2026.
